routing_preferences.name: cheap
routing_preferences.description: simple edits, renames, small localized fixes, factual Q&A, formatting, boilerplate

routing_preferences.name: mid
routing_preferences.description: multi-step edits, moderate debugging, changes contained to a single file or module

routing_preferences.name: strong
routing_preferences.description: architecture and design, cross-file refactors, root-cause debugging, ambiguous or underspecified tasks
